four-seasons.name: Diriyah Four Seasons Hotel
four-seasons.desc: Landmark mixed-use development by DGDA integrating hospitality, residential, retail, and entertainment. Draws inspiration from Najdi architectural language at the UNESCO Heritage Site of At-Turaif, Ad-Diriyah.

qiddiya.name: Qiddiya Water Park Hotel
qiddiya.desc: Immersive entertainment destination in Qiddiya's East Village. Conceptual inspiration drawn from Aqua Regia — adopting principles of velocity architecture where movement is embedded within the geometry of form.

custom-1778997787585.name: Qiddiya Gateway Hotel
custom-1778997787585.desc: The Qiddiya Gateway Hotel is part of the large-scale Qiddiya entertainment and hospitality development located near Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, envisioned as a key component of the Kingdom’s Vision 2030 initiative. The project is designed to support tourism, entertainment, and luxury hospitality within the Qiddiya masterplan, which includes theme parks, sports facilities, resorts, and mixed-use developments.

custom-1779009524658.name: Qiddiya Wadi Hotel
custom-1779009524658.desc: The Qiddiya Wadi Hotel is a key hospitality component within the Janadriyah cultural district at Qiddiya, developed as part of Saudi Arabia’s Vision 2030 initiative. The project is designed to support the Janadriyah cultural destination by providing luxury hospitality experiences that reflect traditional Saudi heritage, architecture, and tourism identity within the larger Qiddiya entertainment masterplan.

capella.name: Diriyah Capella Hotel
capella.desc: Located in the Northern Cultural District of the Diriyah Gate development near King Salman Square with commanding views towards the UNESCO World Heritage Site of At-Turaif and the Formula-E Racetrack.

memorial-field.name: Memorial Field Grandstands
memorial-field.desc: Baseball stadium project encompassing architectural and structural 3D modelling with detailed design documentation. Features timber and concrete construction reflecting a coordinated and constructible design approach.

incline-hs.name: Incline High School
incline-hs.desc: Washoe County School District expansion at Lake Tahoe. Includes a new football/soccer stadium, 2-storey athletic weight room, and a 3-storey expansion of the existing school building.

tahoe-beach.name: Tahoe Beach Club
tahoe-beach.desc: Located on the shores of Lake Tahoe adjacent to the Edgewood Tahoe resort. 13 residential buildings housing 143 luxurious condominium residences, an expansive beach club, and a private beach.

westminster.name: 8131 Westminster Mixed-Use
westminster.desc: 14-storey mixed-use tower comprising 122 premium residential units with street-level retail and office spaces. Designed for urban professionals integrating architectural quality, functional efficiency, and long-term value.

esquimalt.name: Esquimalt Mixed-Use Residential
esquimalt.desc: 198 contemporary rental apartments with street-front retail spaces offering expansive views of Esquimalt's Inner Harbour, positioned along a primary thoroughfare in the rapidly developing municipality.

gorge-road.name: Gorge Road Residential
gorge-road.desc: Mixed-use apartment development at Irma Street, Victoria, BC. 2 retail units and 152 residential apartments across two basement levels and five storeys with a central outdoor amenity space.

108th-avenue.name: 108th Avenue Multi-Family Residence
108th-avenue.desc: Multi-family residential building in Surrey, British Columbia. Divided into 2 twin buildings with 2 basement parking levels and 6 storeys of residential units.

ocean-mist.name: Ocean Mist Residential
ocean-mist.desc: Luxury residential building with ground floor parking and 5-storey residential spaces. Local code compliance integrated throughout the architectural design and BIM coordination workflow.

kingsway.name: Kingsway Avenue Residence
kingsway.desc: Multi-family residential apartments in Port Coquitlam, British Columbia. 2 basement parking levels and 6-storey residential units with full BIM coordination.

custom-1778859714123.name: Vabi RowHouses
custom-1778859714123.desc: The Vabi Rowhouses development in the Netherlands represents a modern approach to sustainable residential urban planning, where BIM (Building Information Modelling) methodologies are integrated to improve design coordination, energy efficiency, and construction management. Dutch rowhouse developments are widely recognized for combining compact urban living with high environmental performance and standardized modular construction systems.

custom-1778860502340.name: Convento Corpus Christi
custom-1778860502340.desc: The Convento Corpus Christi refurbishment project in Portugal involved the digital preservation and renovation of a historic heritage structure using advanced BIM and laser scanning methodologies. The project utilized a Scan-to-BIM workflow, where terrestrial laser scanning technology was employed to capture highly accurate point cloud data of the existing convent geometry, including irregular walls, vaulted ceilings, historical architectural elements, and structural conditions. This digital survey approach significantly improved accuracy compared to conventional manual measurement methods

clash-1.title: Clash Detection Setup
clash-1.desc: Structured clash tests between disciplines using a defined matrix — Architecture vs MEP, Structure vs MEP, and inter-discipline checks for complete coverage.

clash-2.title: Clash Matrix Creation
clash-2.desc: Systematic creation and tracking of clash matrix

clash-4.title: Weekly Viewpoints Creation
clash-4.desc: Creating viewpoints on unresolved clashes, floating elements found on visual checks.

clash-3.title: Issues Creation for Unresolved Clashes
clash-3.desc: Creating issues for unresolved clashes discussed over every weekly BIM Coordination meetings.

sk-1779027113420.title: MEP Service Openings
sk-1779027113420.desc: Create openings on walls for MEP services like Ducts, Pipes, cable trays etc. with Revit links.

eid2.company: elogic Tech Solutions India Pvt. Ltd.

customProjects.name: Stevenson University - Library
customProjects.desc: The Philip A. Zaffere Library is a vital part of campus life, supporting students through study, research, and academic success. Located on the Owings Mills North campus and connected to the Manning Academic Center and School of Design

endorsements.review:
Dilip performs exceptionally well at work, consistently completing all tasks on time and demonstrating strong automation skills. 

Reliable and highly talented, he can do best in any role.
